mapper.select: select id from users where email = #{email} limit 1

select id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, nickname_confirmed, google_subject, risk_profile, investment_dna_type, risk_profile_score, risk_profile_confidence, risk_profile_source, risk_profile_updated_at, auth_token, auth_token_hash, auth_token_expires_at, status from users where google_subject = #{googleSubject} limit 1

insert into users ( email, password_hash, nickname, nickname_normalized, nickname_confirmed, status, google_subject, profile_image_url, last_login_at ) values ( #{email}, 'GOOGLE_AUTH', #{nickname}, #{nicknameNormalized}, false, 'ACTIVE', #{googleSubject}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{lastLoginAt} ) on conflict (email) do update set nickname = case when users.nickname_confirmed = true then users.nickname else excluded.nickname end, nickname_normalized = case when users.nickname_confirmed = true then users.nickname_normalized else excluded.nickname_normalized end, status = 'ACTIVE', google_subject = excluded.google_subject, profile_image_url = excluded.profile_image_url, last_login_at = excluded.last_login_at returning id
mapper.update: update users set auth_token = null, auth_token_hash = #{authTokenHash}, auth_token_expires_at = #{authTokenExpiresAt}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt} where id = #{userId}
update users set required_consent_version = #{consentVersion}, required_consent_agreed_at = #{consentAgreedAt}, updated_at = now() where id = #{userId}
update users set auth_token = null, auth_token_hash = null, auth_token_expires_at = null where id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, nickname_confirmed, google_subject, risk_profile, investment_dna_type, risk_profile_score, risk_profile_confidence, risk_profile_source, risk_profile_updated_at, auth_token, auth_token_hash, auth_token_expires_at, status from users where ( (#{authTokenHash} is not null and auth_token_hash = #{authTokenHash}) or ( #{authToken} is not null and auth_token_hash is null and auth_token = #{authToken} ) ) and auth_token_expires_at > now() and status = 'ACTIVE' limit 1
mapper.update: update users set auth_token = null, auth_token_hash = #{authTokenHash}, updated_at = now() where id = #{userId} and auth_token_hash is null

update users set risk_profile = #{riskProfile}, investment_dna_type = #{investmentDnaType}, risk_profile_score = #{riskProfileScore}, risk_profile_confidence = #{riskProfileConfidence}, risk_profile_source = #{riskProfileSource}, risk_profile_updated_at = #{riskProfileUpdatedAt}, updated_at = now() where id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select distinct u.id from users u join portfolio_items pi on pi.user_id = u.id where u.status = 'ACTIVE' and pi.is_active = true order by u.id asc

select id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, nickname_confirmed, google_subject, risk_profile, investment_dna_type, risk_profile_score, risk_profile_confidence, risk_profile_source, risk_profile_updated_at, auth_token, auth_token_hash, auth_token_expires_at, status from users where id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.update: update users set nickname = #{nickname}, nickname_normalized = #{nicknameNormalized}, nickname_confirmed = true, updated_at = now() where id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into users ( email, password_hash, nickname, nickname_normalized, nickname_confirmed, status ) values ( 'dev@maemoji.local', 'LOCAL_DEV_ONLY', 'maemoji_dev', lower(trim('maemoji_dev')), true, 'ACTIVE' ) on conflict (email) do nothing
